{{Infobox concept
| name = Genesis
| introduced = Reaper
}}

''See also: [[Genesis Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Genesis is a specialized, two-headed [[Soulsmithing]] hammer crafted by [[Lindon]]. Designed to advance his abilities in the art of [[Soulsmithing]], the tool serves to focus and bind his powers during the creation process. The hammer features two distinct heads: one side is used for purification by channeling [[pure madra]], while the other can be used to channel [[Blackflame]]. As [[Lindon]] uses the tool to forge various [[Dreadgod]] weapons, Genesis grows both physically and metaphysically heavier, exhibiting a sense of eagerness as it is utilized.}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Genesis]] is a name [[Lindon]] chooses for his hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] spun [[Genesis]] in one hand.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Genesis]] is [[Lindon]]'s newly crafted [[Soulsmithing]] hammer.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Genesis]] is a two-headed hammer that is small enough to fit in one hand.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Genesis]] was made to bind [[Lindon]]'s powers together and focus them on creation.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Genesis]] is [[Lindon]]'s double-headed hammer.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] summoned [[Genesis]] from his void space and switched it to the [[pure madra]] side to repair [[Netherclaw]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Genesis]] is a two-headed hammer that grows stronger with every [[Dreadgod weapon]] made.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses a weapon called [[Genesis]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Genesis]] is [[Lindon]]'s hammer, featuring one side smoldering with [[Blackflame]] and the other shining blue-white.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Genesis,” Lindon said firmly, to cut off the discussion beginning around him.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
